zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Danielston於1351年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾達爾馬爾諾可時，他的父親Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle44歲，母親Mary Fleming41歲。他於1377年與Margaret Montifichet在蘇格蘭艾斯爾艾爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1399年在英國蘇格蘭格拉斯哥享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Danielston于1351年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾達爾馬爾諾可时，他的父亲Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle44岁，母亲Mary Fleming41岁。他于1377年与Margaret Montifichet在苏格兰艾斯爾艾爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1399年在英国苏格兰格拉斯哥享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Danielston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Lars, Mauritz, Nels, Nils, Sigfrid, Alf, Arlys, Berent, Bjorn, Eskil, Gunner.
Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Danielsson: patronymic from the personal name Daniel .
Americanized form of Norwegian, Danish, and North German   Danielsen  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Daniel
meanings: English, French, Spanish, Portuguese, German, Polish, Czech, Slovak, Romanian, Jewish, Assyrian/Chaldean, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania); Breton (rarely Le Daniel); Hungarian (Dániel): from the Biblical personal name Daniel, Syriac (Assyrian/Chaldean) Dānīʾēl, Hungarian Dániel (from Hebrew Daniyyel ‘God is my judge’), borne by a major prophet in the Bible. The chief factor influencing the popularity of the personal name (and hence the frequency of the surname) was undoubtedly the dramatic story in the Book of Daniel recounting the prophet's steadfast adherence to his religious faith despite pressure and persecution from the Mesopotamian kings in whose court he served: Nebuchadnezzar, Belshazzar, and Darius. The name was also borne by a 2nd-century Christian martyr and by a 9th-century hermit, the legend of whose lives were popular among Christians during the Middle Ages. Among Orthodox Christians in Eastern Europe the name was also popular as being that of a 4th-century Persian martyr, who was venerated in the Orthodox Church. In France, this surname is most common in Brittany.

Irish (Tipperary and Waterford): shortened form of McDaniel , which is actually a variant of McDonnell , from the Gaelic form of Irish Donal (equivalent to Scottish Donald), erroneously associated with the Biblical personal name Daniel. See also O'Donnell .
Americanized or Germanized form of Slovenian Danijel: from the Biblical personal name Danijel ‘Daniel’ (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Danielston was born in 1351, in Dalmarnock, Lanarkshire, Scotland, his father, Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle, was 44 and his mother, Mary Fleming, was 41. He married Margaret Montifichet in 1377, in Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1399, in Glasgow, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Danielston est né en 1351, à Dalmarnock, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Mary Fleming, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Montifichet en 1377, à Ayr, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1399, à Glasgow, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Danielston 1351 in Dalmarnock, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle 44 und seine Mutter Mary Fleming 41. Er hat 1377 in Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland Margaret Montifichet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1399 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Glasgow, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Danielston è nato il nel 1351 nel Dalmarnock, Lanarkshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Mary Fleming, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Montifichet nel 1377, nel Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1399, nel Glasgow, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Danielstonが1351年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアダルマルノックで生まれた時，父Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castleは44歳，母Mary Flemingは41歳であった。1377年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアエイルでMargaret Montifichetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1399年にイギリススコットランドグラスゴウで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Danielston(이)가 1351년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 다마노c크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Fleming(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1377년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 에이르에서 Margaret Montifichet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1399년 영국 스코틀랜드 글라스고에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Danielston nasceu em 1351, em Dalmarnock, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Mary Fleming, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Montifichet em 1377, em Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1399, em Glasgow, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Danielston родился в 1351 г. в местности далмарнокк, ланаркшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Fleming, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Montifichet в 1377 г. в местности аир, аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1399 г. в местности гласгоу, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Danielston nació en 1351, en Dalmarnock, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Mary Fleming, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Margaret Montifichet en 1377, en Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1399, en Glasgow, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años.
